stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
For take-off performance purposes, you need to establish a CG position at take-off at 798 inches aft of the datum. Given the following information, which one of the two boxes must be moved and into which hold?

Current CG position: 780 inches aft of the datum.
Actual Take-off mass: 48 700 lb.
Box X is located 1185 inches aft of the datum, in hold 5.
Box Z is located 180 inches aft of the datum, in hold 1.
Both boxes have the same mass of 880 lb.

Consider the fuel consumption from engine start to take-off negligible.

options.a: Box Z must be moved to hold 5.
options.b: Box Z must be moved to hold 4.
options.c: Box X must be moved to hold 4.
options.d: Box X must be moved to hold 1.
